title: Create the ability to undo multiple errors
excerpt: I’m setting up a content calendar and I keep bulk editing groups not realizing I still have other groups selected and then I lose all the data I put into the previous ones and can’t get it back because I don’t realize it…

posts.author: lmudrock (Lauren)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m setting up a content calendar and I keep bulk editing groups not realizing I still have other groups selected and then I lose all the data I put into the previous ones and can’t get it back because I don’t realize it until I’ve already editing about 3 other groups

SUPER discouraging, especially when my thoughts are moving a mile and minute and I can’t remember all the details I put into the previous posts. Would love a quick and easy “cmmd + Z” undo feature that lets you undo a LOT of your actions. If the current activity log approach works, it doesn’t feel very user friendly and I’m worried I’m messing it up more. Thanks!
